title: How to Use Claude Cowork (Step-by-Step) | AI Agent on Your Computer
summary: Claude Cowork is an AI agent that runs locally on computers and integrates with files, email, calendar, and apps to automate workflows. It requires Claude Pro or Max plans and supports organizing files, connecting Gmail and Google Calendar, and scheduling recurring tasks.
